zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Clary於1647年8月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，她的父親John Clary35歲，母親Sarah Cassell28歲。她於1667年12月13日與John Perry II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1730年10月11日在她的家鄉享年83歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Clary于1647年8月4日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，她的父亲John Clary35岁，母亲Sarah Cassell28岁。她于1667年12月13日与John Perry II在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1730年10月11日在她的家乡享年83岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃特托笛卡爾 波英 普拉斯。

nameMeanings.name: Clary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: probably from Middle English clary, clarie ‘clary’ (the pot herb Salvia sclarea), either a topographic name denoting someone who lived near where the plant grew or a metonymic occupational name for someone who sold these herbs.

variants.name: Cleary
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Malachy, Aileen, Brigid, Ronan, Aine, Bridie, Egan, William Kevin.

Irish (especially Tipperary): from Ó Cléirigh ‘descendant of Cléireach’, a name meaning ‘clerk’ or ‘cleric’. Ó Cléirigh is a famous learned family in Ireland. The less common surname McCleary , formed with the article, Mac an Chléirigh ‘son of the cleric’, is a variant. Both Irish names are also commonly Anglicized by translation as Clarke .

variants.name: Clarey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Delma, Donovan.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Clary was born on 4 August 1647, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Clary, was 35 and her mother, Sarah Cassell, was 28. She married John Perry II on 13 December 1667, in Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 October 1730, in her hometown, at the age of 83, and was buried in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Clary est née le 4 août 1647, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Clary, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Sarah Cassell, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Perry II le 13 décembre 1667, à Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 octobre 1730, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Clary am 4. August 1647 in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Clary 35 und ihre Mutter Sarah Cassell 28. Sie hat am 13. Dezember 1667 in Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America John Perry II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Oktober 1730 im Alter von 83 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Clary è nata il il 4 agosto 1647 nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Clary, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Sarah Cassell, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Perry II il 13 dicembre 1667, nel Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 ottobre 1730, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, B: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックススドブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Claryが1647年8月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで生まれた時，父John Claryは35歳，母Sarah Cassellは28歳であった。1667年12月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーワテルトウンでJohn Perry IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1730年10月11日に故郷で83歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスワテルトウンオルド ブリイング プレイスにて埋葬された。

ko.Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 캄브리지
ko.Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex,: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스
ko.Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운
ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.Sudbury, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 수드버이
ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Clary(이)가 1647년 8월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Clary(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Cassell(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1667년 12월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운에서 John Perry II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1730년 10월 11일 그녀의 고향에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 왓르타운 드 버이잉 플레이스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Clary nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1647, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, John Clary, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Cassell, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Perry II em 13 de dezembro de 1667, em Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1730, em sua cidade natal, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Clary родилась 4 августа 1647 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Clary было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Cassell, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Perry II 13 декабря 1667 г. в местности вэитиртоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 октября 1730 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности олд буринг плеис, вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Clary nació el 4 de agosto de 1647, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, John Clary, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Sarah Cassell, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Perry II el 13 de diciembre de 1667, en Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1730, en su pueblo, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Old Burying Place, Watertown, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
